data.title: Dow Jones futures down, Google & 2 other AI stocks in buy zones despite market retreat. Financials & software slump.
data.description: The market faced a decline from highs driven by a drop in financials and software sectors, with the Dow leading the retreat. Despite this, Google and other companies in the artificial intelligence (AI) sector are showing promise as they are currently in favorable buy zones. Dow Jones Futures experienced a fall in response to these shifts. Google, along with three other AI stocks, are particularly standing out in terms of potential investment opportunities.

data.title: Rising spot flows propel Bitcoin rally; analysts predict $100K run with retail FOMO on the horizon, says Santiment.
data.description: There is a possibility of increased retail fear of missing out (FOMO) in the upcoming days if Bitcoin reaches $100,000, as per crypto sentiment platform Santiment.
China’s ChiNext gains over 2% in early trade.

data.title: BitMine's BMNR shares rose 3.62% to $32.35 in after-hours trading. They acquired 24,266 Ethereum, totaling 4.17 million ETH valued at $13 billion. BitMine is near its authorized share limit of 500 million. Shareholder vote scheduled for Thursday at Wynn Las Vegas.
data.description: BitMine Immersion Technologies Inc. (NYSE: BMNR) stock is gaining traction as shares of the blockchain technology company increased by 3.62% to $32.35 in after-hours trading on Tuesday. The company recently acquired 24,266 Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH), bringing their total holdings to 4.17 million ETH valued at $13 billion, accounting for 3.45% of ETH's circulating supply. Chairman Tom Lee indicated that BitMine is on the brink of reaching its authorized share limit of 500 million. A crucial shareholder vote is scheduled for Thursday at Wynn Las Vegas, requiring approval from at least 50.1% of BitMine's outstanding shares to proceed. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: AWOL Vision partners with NFL QB Kirk Cousins as brand ambassador after CES 2026 debut in China.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, in SHENZHEN, China, a prominent audiovisual technology company named AWOL Vision revealed NFL quarterback Kirk Cousins as its Brand Ambassador. This partnership encompasses AWOL Vision and its luxury sub-brand, Valerion. The collaboration was introduced at CES 2026.

data.title: Trump claims U.S. is getting 50 million barrels of oil daily from Venezuela, says operation was flawless, economy booming.
data.description: President Trump announced that the U.S. is receiving 50 million barrels of crude oil daily from Venezuela following a successful military operation capturing President Maduro. Trump praised the operation as "flawless," stating it has opened doors for significant oil shipments. This development is expected to lower oil prices. Trump noted that winning is beneficial and emphasized plans to work with Venezuela to strengthen the country. The President also highlighted the robust state of the American economy. Full details on Benzinga.com.
